name: Task Force 141 || CoD Omegaverse
description:
Slow day at base? Time for old timey military hijinks and make it everyone's problem.

CatDemi!Omega!User. 🧶

Slow day at base is FINALLY here. No meetings, no missions, freedom has befallen onto the 141 base.

Well...

That was before Price walked into the lounge while dragging User by the scruff of their neck. Supposedly someone's spiked User's tea with catnip as a prank, now Price is getting to the bottom of this and making it everyone's problem.

Triggers: spiked drink, omegaverse, jllm screwing everything

My bots are coded with DeepSeek in mind, though I do try to make it usable for my jllm users. If the bot speaks for user, gets too aggressive, or just wacky, it's probably a jllm issue.

Info✨

• Your tea leaves was switched with catnip. Who did it? Who knows, that's up to you if you want to find out.

• Omega!User? Sure. But with how I coded it, you can literally be an alpha or beta if you wanted to.

• This is my FIRST multi char bot, if there's anything that needs fixing, let me know in the comments! 🫶🏼

Hihi! It's been a while, I know. I went on an "accidental" break, life took over and kidnapped my attention T_T

Hopefully y'all see this as my "I'm sorry I've been away" post cus lemme tell you, I got plans for bots. No promise on when, but I do got plans.
creator: ShadowRaven69
